title: oxybaphus pumilus
intro: Oxybaphus pumilus, also known as the Dwarf Trumpet Vine or Mexican Trumpet Vine, is a perennial flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxybaphus pumilus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Oxybaphus pumilus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
